My approach

Coaching vs traditional teaching

Traditional method

  • Fixed curriculum for everyone
  • Grammar and textbook-centered
  • Teacher sets the pace
  • Progress by calendar, not by skill

Language Hotspot coaching

  • Program built around your goals
  • Spoken practice from session one
  • You set the pace and direction
  • Progress based on real skill acquisition
What I offer

Languages & services

🇺🇸
English
General English from zero to advanced. Conversational and Business English. All levels welcome — including complete beginners.
Most requested
🇲🇽
Spanish
Native speaker. All levels. Ideal for professionals expanding into Spanish-speaking markets.
Native speaker

French
General language and culture. From beginner to upper-intermediate. Real-world communication in authentic cultural contexts.
Language & culture
🇮🇹
Italian
General language and culture. From beginner to upper-intermediate. Conversational Italian with cultural depth.
Language & culture
📝
Translation & Subtitling
EN↔ES specialist. Technical translation, subtitling, and document localization. Also available in French and Italian.

Empower your team. Lead in English.

Delivered by Max Valdiviezo — Founder & Language Acquisition Specialist

Communication-first. Results-driven. Strategic language training for executives, decision-makers, and corporate teams — tailored for American companies.

Founded 2017. 100% direct — no intermediaries.
Every program is designed, delivered, and followed up by Max directly. Not a school — a specialist service.
Strategic approach

Not a class. A results-driven program.

Each program begins with diagnosis, not assumptions. Content is built around real communication needs — not a fixed syllabus.

01
Initial meeting
With management or HR to understand the business context and goals.
02
Diagnostic assessment
Grammar, listening comprehension, and oral production per participant.
03
Custom program design
Content adapted to your industry, team level, and communication needs.
04
Delivery & follow-up
Real simulations, conversational practice, and monthly progress reports.
Who is this for

Two programs, one goal

Individual + Linguistic Coaching

  • Directors, managers, and decision-makers
  • Professionals with international exposure
  • 1:1 sessions — 100% personalized
  • Business English or General English
  • Also available: French & Italian
  • Optional 30-min sessions for conversational practice

Group Corporate Program

  • Administrative and operational teams
  • Max 6 participants per group
  • Can be offered as an employee benefit
  • Real simulations: meetings, presentations, reports
  • HR progress reports available (KPIs) — upon request
  • Recommended cycle: 6–12 months
